trades.reasoning: MACD has crossed below signal line (bearish reversal) while the position sits at breakeven — capital is better redeployed into score-95 candidates with cleaner momentum setups.
Score 95 with all four bullish signals firing together: RSI in momentum zone at 66.3, MACD bullish crossover, price 18% above SMA-20, and confirming volume surge.
Score 95 with RSI at 69.7 (peak of bullish zone), rising MACD histogram, and price above SMA-20 — medium conviction only because high beta warrants caution on a slightly risk-off day.

decisions.briefing: Markets are mildly negative today (S&P -0.4%, NASDAQ flat), signaling a low-energy, slightly cautious session rather than a true selloff. Our portfolio is up +16.9% but cash has fallen to just $105 — too low to fill any of the 4 open slots. SMCI's MACD has turned bearish and the position is sitting at its exact cost basis with no buffer, making it the weakest link. Selling all 41 shares frees roughly $1,380 to rotate into AAON and TSLA, both of which are scoring 95 with full momentum confirmation.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities ended the week on a soft note, with the S&P 500 slipping 0.4% while the NASDAQ held near flat at -0.1%, reflecting cautious positioning ahead of the weekend amid lingering trade policy uncertainty and mixed signals on the Fed's rate path. The relative outperformance of tech-heavy NASDAQ versus the broader S&P suggests large-cap technology names provided a modest cushion. With no major macro catalysts on the day, price action was driven largely by profit-taking and sector rotation rather than any single headline.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股本週最後一個交易日表現疲弱，標普500指數下跌0.4%，納斯達克指數幾近平盤，僅微跌0.1%，反映市場在週末前保持觀望，貿易政策不確定性與聯儲局降息步伐的模糊前景持續壓抑情緒。以科技股為主的納指相對抗跌，顯示大型科技股仍具一定支撐力。由於當日缺乏重大宏觀催化劑，市場走勢主要由獲利回吐及板塊輪動主導，而非單一消息面驅動。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum rotation means selling positions that have lost their upward trend and redeploying that capital into stocks with stronger momentum signals. Today's SMCI sale is a textbook example: when MACD flips bearish and a stock stalls at its cost basis, holding it is an opportunity cost — that same capital can work harder in AAON or TSLA where volume surges and MACD crossovers both confirm an active uptrend.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能輪動是指賣出已失去上升趨勢的持倉，並將資金重新配置至動能訊號更強的標的。今日賣出SMCI正是此策略的典型應用：當MACD出現看跌交叉、股價在成本附近徘徊時，繼續持倉實質上是一種機會成本。將這筆資金轉移到如AAON這類成交量急增、MACD同步確認上升趨勢的個股，有助於提升整體投資組合的風險報酬效率。
